title: Project hours by person and reports by a chosen date range
excerpt: Hei, new to monday and need som advice from people that have done this before. Probably easy enough if you know how. I have projects, people and hours and need to record these plus make the information available by proje…

posts.author: foxpau (Paul Fox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hei, new to monday and need som advice from people that have done this before. Probably easy enough if you know how. I have projects, people and hours and need to record these plus make the information available by project, people and dates afterwards for billing. I think the time tracking is what I need and have setup a board for each project but this will get big over time so am wondering if its better with a project board and a group for each week? But then how do I get a monthly report? and it is possible to get a person report over multiple boards and multiple groups?
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @foxpau - were you able to find the answer?

Were looking for something like this: https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009662960-How-freelancers-can-track-their-time

posts.author: foxpau (Paul Fox)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have something that works well for us now. I made a board that is just the projects and linked to that from the hour registering board so it works like a dropdown. I have a date column that fills out to hidden columns for month and year so
that when I use the filter I can select projects, months, years, people etc.
